titleStmt.title: SII 8.404: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 404. (A.R. No. 118 of 1903). ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūmalaṟtiruvum porucayamaṭantaiyum tāmaraikkuvimulaic cayappuya ppa vetanāviṉ kātaṉmātu kaviṉpeṟat tiḷaippa ve yavar viḻākkoṭi paṭantoṟu meṭuppa kkaruṅkalik kaṉal keṭak kaṭavuḷ vetiyar Aruntoḻilveḻvic ceṅkaṉal vaḷarp pacurutiyun tamiḻun tolvaḷaṅ kulavap porutiṟalāḻi pūtalañ cūḻvara Orukai yirucevi mummata nāṟkoṭṭa yirāpatamutal ceyirtarukoṟṟat teṇṭicaiyāṉai yerutta meṟik kaṇṭanā ṭemateṉak kayal kaḷikūrak kocalan tuḷuvaṅ kutiraṅ kuccaram pocala makatam poppaḷam puṇṭaraṅ kaliṅka-miḻaṅ kaṭāraṅ kevuṭan teliṅkañ coṉakañ ciṉaka mutalāya vitimuṟai tikaḻa vevveṟu vakutta mutunilakkiḻamaiyiṉ muṭipuṉai ventaṟku Oru taṉināyakaṉeṉ ṟulaketta tirumuṭi cūṭic ceṅko loccik koṟṟattaraḷak kuḷirkuṭai niḻaṟ kaṟṟaikkavari kāvalar vica miṭaikatir ṅkātaṉattuṭaṉ muṭicūṭi yuyarkulattiruveṉap paṅkayamalaṟ karaṅkuvittu pāttivarmaṅkaiyar tiraṇṭu vaṇaṅkuñ ceṉṉic cuṭaroḷi mavulic cuṭarma
�māṟapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīcuntarapāṇṭiyatevarkku yāṇṭu nālāvatu nāḷ Orunūṟṟu Eḻupattuañcināl māṭakkuḷakkiḻ maturaikkoyilp paḷḷiyaṟaikkūṭattu paḷḷippiṭam maḻavarāyaṉil Eḻuntaruḷiyiruntupokaiy teṇṭu cevvirukkaināṭṭuc ciriḷaṅkomaṅkalamāṉa Ulakamātevippaṭṭiṉattu nakarattārpakkal vilai koṇṭa nilattil Ivar Eḻuntaruḷuvitta pokiśva ramuṭaiyanāyaṉār koyiṟ civappirāmaṇarum tevarkaṉmikaḷum ceyyat tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi Ittevarkkut tirumaṭaippa ṭṭu veṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷukku Innāṭṭuc cakkarapāṇinallūrum Ivvūrp paṟṟiṉa vaṭṭakkuṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa kuḷaṅkaḷum Eṭṭieriyum Iṭaikkuḷanāṭṭuc ceḻuvaṉūrāṉa catturupayaṅkaranallūrum kiṭāramāṉa kiṭāraṅkoṇṭacoḻapuramum koḻuvūrnāṭṭu kiḷiyūrumāka Ivvūr nāṉkellaik kuṭpaṭṭa
Antarāyamum viniyokamum taruvatāṉaaccum kāriyavārāṭciyum veṭṭipāṭṭamum pañcupili cantivikkarakappeṟum taṟiiṟai taṭṭārppāṭṭamum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭiṉavum nālāvati ṉetirāmāṇṭi ṉetirāmāṇṭumutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭappeṟaveṇu(m) meṉṟum cevvirukkai- nāṭṭup puṟakkuṭiyil nāṉkellaik kuṭpaṭṭa nirnilamuṅ karuñcey puṉceyyum nattamum toṭṭamum kuḷamum kuḷappuruppum Uṭpaṭṭa nilattil paḻaṉtevatāṉam paḷḷiccantam nikki nikki Uḷḷa nilamum ṉila yārum vanta kārāṇmai miyāṭciyum(k)kaṭamai Antarāyamum viṉiyokamum taruvatāṉa Accuṅkāriyavārāṭciyum veṭṭippāṭṭamum pañcupili cantivikkirakappeṟum taṟiyiṟai taṭṭaḷippāṭṭamum cekkiṟaiyum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭiṉavum Uṭpaṭa Ivāṇṭumutal tevatāṉaiṟaiyiliyāka Iṭappeṟaveṇu meṉṟu Aiyyaṉ maḻavarāya
ṉ vaṭṭakkuṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa kuḷaṅkaḷum Eṭṭieriyum Iṭaikkuḷanāṭṭuc ceḻuvaṉūrāṉa catturupayaṅkaranallūrum kiṭāramāṉa kiṭāraṅkoṇṭacoḻapuramum koḻuvūrnāṭṭuk kiḷiyūrum Āka Ivvūrkaḷ nāṉkellaik kuṭpaṭṭa nirnilamu ṅ karuñcey puṉceyyum Uḷpaṭṭa nilattil paḻantevatāṉam paḷḷiccantam nikki nikkiyuḷḷa nilam kaṭamaiyum Antarāyamum viṉiyokamum taruvatāṉaaccum kāriyavārāṭciyum veṭṭipāṭṭamum pañcupili cantivikkarakappeṟum taṟiiṟaiyum taṭṭaḻipāṭṭamum cekkiṟaiyum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭiṉavum Uḷpaṭa Ivvāṇṭu mutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyā yiṟuppatākavum cevvirukkaināṭṭup puṟakkuṭi nāṉkellaik kuṭpaṭṭa nirṉilamuṅ karuñcey puṉceyyum nattamun toṭṭamum kuḷamum kuḷapparuppum Uṭpaṭṭa nilattil paḻantevatāṉam paḷḷiccantam nikki nikkiyuḷḷa nilam muṉṉuṭaiyā
ḻanallūr veṭṭaṉūruṭaiyāṉ Arayaṉ civallavaṉāṉa mātavarāyaṉ Eḻutteṉṟum Ivai kāñaiirukkai Irāciṅkanallūrp peṟṟāṉ veḷāṉāṉa A[ṉantapaṉma(�)ṉ EḻutteṉṟuA small portion of the inscription is lost.
Digital edition of SII 8.404 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
